domain: industrial pumps, seals, bearings, couplings, and rotating equipment service hardware

ideas.idea_title: Split Pump Bearing Housing With Sight Glass Bosses
ideas.product_context: Serviceable bearing support for horizontal industrial pump shafts in process plants.
ideas.core_function: Supports rotating shaft bearings while providing inspection, lubrication access, and removable maintenance covers.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines split-line geometry, bearing seats, cover flanges, drain bosses, inspection windows, and asymmetric service features that stress feature hierarchy without relying on simple prismatic forms.

ideas.product_context: Preassembled seal module for centrifugal pump shaft sealing during plant maintenance.
ideas.core_function: Holds seal faces, flush ports, sleeve interface, and gland bolting in a replaceable cartridge package.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires coaxial shaft openings, distributed fastener pads, radial port bosses, stepped faces, and nested ring-like regions that challenge annular part modeling.

ideas.idea_title: Flexible Spacer Coupling Guard With Inspection Windows
ideas.product_context: Safety enclosure around spacer couplings between motors and rotating pumps.
ideas.core_function: Prevents contact with rotating coupling components while allowing visual checks and partial access for service.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests curved sheet-like shells, removable end bands, repeated ventilation openings, cutout windows, and bracket interfaces in a single protective part.

ideas.product_context: Workshop tool used to remove stuck impellers from pump shafts without damaging the casing interface.
ideas.core_function: Applies axial extraction force through a central forcing screw while gripping behind the impeller hub.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Introduces forked load paths, thick ribs, threaded center boss representation, relief clearances, and ergonomic wrench flats that push beyond ordinary bracket geometry.

ideas.product_context: Maintenance fixture for safely holding pump bearings during controlled installation heating.
ideas.core_function: Supports circular bearings above a heater base while accommodating multiple bearing outside profiles.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes angled contact faces, sliding supports, locking features, heat-clearance openings, and repeated but nonidentical cradle elements that test parametric intent.

ideas.idea_title: Stuffing Box Lantern Ring Extraction Tool
ideas.product_context: Field service hardware for removing lantern rings and packing remnants from packed pump glands.
ideas.core_function: Hooks or expands inside a gland cavity to pull worn sealing components out from around a shaft.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD representation with slender curved hooks, expandable segmented geometry, shaft-clearance voids, pin joints, and compact service-tool proportions.

ideas.idea_title: Rotating Equipment Shaft Alignment Target Bracket
ideas.product_context: Temporary bracket for mounting dial indicators or laser targets during pump and motor alignment.
ideas.core_function: Clamps onto a shaft or coupling hub and holds measurement targets rigidly at adjustable offsets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines split clamp geometry, hinge or fastener lugs, radial arms, accessory mounting faces, and multiple datum-like surfaces that stress assembly-oriented modeling.

ideas.idea_title: API Pump Seal Flush Manifold Block
ideas.product_context: Compact service manifold for routing flush, quench, and drain lines around mechanical seals.
ideas.core_function: Routes process support fluids through labeled ports, valves, and instrument connections near the seal gland.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests intersecting internal passage intent, external port bosses, plug pads, mounting ears, and face labeling zones without needing actual fluid passage dimensions.

ideas.product_context: Support component used inside vertical pump columns to center and stabilize a rotating lineshaft.
ideas.core_function: Holds a central bearing carrier in position through radial arms connected to the column wall.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires circular hub geometry, multiple radial arms, open flow windows, bearing-retainer features, and symmetric relationships with service-specific interruptions.

ideas.product_context: Shop-floor gauge for checking wear and burrs around coupling hub bores and keyways.
ideas.core_function: Registers against hub bore and keyway surfaces to reveal service damage before reassembly.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Exercises negative-space representation, stepped cylindrical references, keyway-like protrusions, handle integration, and inspection contact surfaces that are difficult to capture as simple solids.
